arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes was 'ready to leave Man United' until Ineos intervention promoted major U-turn
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes is one of the club's key players and first name on the teamsheet for Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Man Utd in contact with Man City’s dream Guardiola heir to replace Ten Hag
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, the Red Devils have already made contact with Sporting CP boss Ruben Amorim, who has been hailed as a natural heir to Guardiola at City. Manchester United are already in contact with numerous potential replacements for manager Erik ten Hag – but now the Red Devils are seeking to steal a sensational march on rivals Manchester City in the race for a coach lined up as Pep Guardiola’s successor.

arts.ttl: Man United boss Erik ten Hag saw job chances completely change as players intervened
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was reportedly in contention to become the new Bayern Munich manager earlier this year, though a number of the German side's players were against the Dutchman's appointment

arts.ttl: Ten Hag slams ‘bad rules’ that ‘FORCED’ Man Utd into a mistake
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has complained that “bad rules” forced the Old Trafford club into the sale of Scott McTominay to Napoli . As I said, when he left, I didn’t want this but that’s the rules the club had to deal with.

arts.ttl: 'Sensational' Manager 'Would Speak to' Man Utd About Replacing Ten Hag
arts.sum: Pressure is mounting on Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag and Stuttgart's Sebastian Hoeness is among the rumoured candidates to replace him

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils ahead of Newcastle United in race for former Manchester City star
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly ready to leapfrog Newcastle United and sign Bayern Munich forward LEroy Sane should an opportunity present itself.

arts.ttl: Man United injury news: Red Devils wonderkid confident of returning against Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Manchester United centre-back Lenny Yoro has reportedly told friends that he will return to full fitness by the time his team play Arsenal in December.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Brentford – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Thomas Frank’s Brentford to Old Trafford this weekend, searching for their first win in over a month. Meanwhile, the visitors will be looking to extend their remarkable record of netting in the opening two minutes of a match, a statistic they have achieved in each of their last four Premier League games. arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag admits Man Utd transfer interest in Benfica star with contract clause
arts.sum: Alvaro Fernandez left Manchester United for Benfica in the summer as he sought regular football but the Red Devils could re-sign him due to their buy-back clause
